vocab.meaning: kỹ năng/năng lực thể thao xuất chúng
vocab.example: National tournaments serve as a stage for athletes to showcase their sporting prowess and inspire the younger generation.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra/khơi dậy cảm giác thuộc về một tập thể
vocab.example: Participating in local football leagues helps to engender a sense of belonging among residents in high-density urban areas.

vocab.meaning: đám đông cổ vũ nhiệt thành/cuồng nhiệt cho một bên
vocab.example: The stadium is always packed with a partisan crowd whose deafening cheers create an intimidating atmosphere for visiting teams.

vocab.meaning: trau dồi/rèn luyện tính kỷ luật
vocab.example: Parents often encourage their children to play basketball, not just for fitness, but to cultivate discipline and a strong work ethic.

vocab.meaning: hợp nhất/kết nối đông đảo người dân
vocab.example: Major sporting victories have a unique power to unify the populace, momentarily erasing political or social divisions.

vocab.meaning: những người ủng hộ nồng nhiệt/mạnh mẽ
vocab.example: The national volleyball team has a massive following of fervent supporters who travel across the country to witness every match.

vocab.meaning: một phần tinh túy/điển hình của cái gì
vocab.example: Community sports days are a quintessential part of rural life, bringing together people of all ages for friendly competition.
People in my country are particularly moved by teams that manage to triumph over adversity through sheer grit and determination.
The beauty of team sports lies in the shared glory that players feel when their collective efforts finally pay off.

vocab.meaning: thấm nhuần/truyền tải những giá trị cốt lõi
vocab.example: Team-based activities are integrated into the school curriculum to instill core values like cooperation, respect, and integrity.
